meta.description: Critical/printed edition behind each Sanskrit e-text, and its scan on archive.org where found.
meta.method: Per text: trace the source e-text (GRETIL header, or DSBC / University of the West, or other), read its bibliographic header to identify the printed edition, then query the archive.org advancedsearch API with multiple strategies. Researched by a 116-agent fleet.
meta.archive_confidence: high=series+vol+editor match; medium=right work/series, volume uncertain; low=plausible only; none=not found
meta.order: chronological (by posterior median date, oldest first)
